# Shovel

## Tags
dig, spade, treasure

## Categories
nature, tools, gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/shovel)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Shovel;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Shovel { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
